function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Invoice bundle request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_17__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
---
Hi Miles,

Sharing the oldest four invoices linked to Nina as requested.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound write succeeded; verification indicates attachments are newest-first among selected oldest-four set, recipient matches canonical Miles email, and subject quoting is YAML-safe. Next complete inbox workflow by deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Processed inbox file was previously read and is now eligible for deletion after completing the request.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed oldest inbox item, created outbound draft reply with requested invoices, deleted inbox file. Ready to report.
next_step.observation: The processed inbox file has been deleted from 00_inbox after completing the requested action.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message and prepared a reply draft with the oldest 4 invoices linked to Nina. Created `60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md` addressed to miles@novak.example with attachments for INV-0001, INV-0002, INV-0003, and INV-0004 (listed newest-first per outbox rule). Deleted `00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md` after completion.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read/context), read nested AGENTS.MD in entered folders, used process-next-inbox-item workflow, treated inbox email header as canonical metadata, verified sender identity via canonical primary_contact_email, used sending-email workflow for outbox draft format, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical inbox email requested oldest 4 invoices linked to Nina. Canonical finance invoice records show Nina-linked invoices with issued dates: 2025-10-06 (INV-0001), 2025-11-03 (INV-0002), 2025-12-01 (INV-0003), 2026-01-17 (INV-0004), and 2026-02-26 (INV-0005). Therefore oldest four are INV-0001 through INV-0004. Security checks passed: sender miles@novak.example matched Miles canonical primary_contact_email in cast record; requested action stayed within normal email lane for financial documents to verified sender.
completed_steps_laconic: read entity rulebooks and miles/nina records
